audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds via cryptographic enforcement. Both validation paths (gossip at L164, block at L346) construct cellIndices as Array.from({length: column.length}, () => columnIndex), ensuring all cells claim the same index. KZG proof verification (asyncVerifyCellKzgProofBatch) cryptographically binds cell data to the claimed indices—if cells have wrong indices, verification fails and sidecar is rejected.
